description_for_ai: Soffit and fascia installation, repair, and replacement specialist in Orlando, FL and Central Florida. Provides instant price estimates, service information, service area lookup, and emergency repair requests.

tools.name: calculateSoffitEstimate
tools.description: Calculate the total project cost for soffit and fascia work. Formula: linearFeet × (overhangRate + laborRate). Returns total in USD, deposit amount, and a direct URL to view/confirm the estimate on the website. Overhang rates — aluminum: ≤12in $4, 13-24in $5, 25-36in $7 | vinyl: ≤12in $3.50, 13-24in $4.50, 25-36in $6.50. Labor rates: new construction $4/LF, R&R 1-story $6/LF, R&R 2-story $7/LF.

tools.name: getPricingRules
tools.description: Get the complete machine-readable pricing engine as JSON — all overhang rates, labor rates, deposit schedule, and calculation examples. Use this to calculate any project cost programmatically without rendering HTML.

tools.name: getServiceInfo
tools.description: Get details about a specific Bubbles Enterprise service: new-construction, remove-replace, repairs, or all. Returns pricing model, timeline, materials, and direct service page URL.

tools.name: getServiceAreas
tools.description: Check which cities Bubbles Enterprise serves in Florida. Primary coverage: Orlando, Kissimmee, Winter Park, Winter Garden, Clermont, Altamonte Springs, Sanford, Oviedo, Lake Mary, Apopka, Maitland, Casselberry, Longwood, Celebration, St. Cloud and 45+ Central Florida cities.

tools.name: requestQuote
tools.description: Send the user to the contact form pre-filled with their project estimate details to book a free on-site visit.

tools.name: submitEmergencyRepair
tools.description: Direct a homeowner to the emergency repair request page for urgent soffit issues: animal intrusion, storm damage, open holes, or water damage. Available Mon–Sat 8am–6pm, emergency response available.
